name: Transformers: Victory
original_name: 戦え!超ロボット生命体 トランスフォーマーV
overview: Transformers: Victory is an anime series produced by Toei Animation. It is a Japanese-produced spin-off of the well-known original Transformers cartoon, and the final complete animated series from the original "Generation 1" era.

trailers.title: Opening | Transformers V(Victory) - Kōji Kaya and Morinoki Children's Chorus [Subtitled]
